'''Flambeed''' is the second boss in the [[Recipe for Disaster]] quest. He is similar to the boss [[Fareed]] from [[Desert Treasure I]]. He attacks using fairly strong [[melee]] attack and close-range [[Magic]]. Players are advised to wear [[ice gloves]] or use [[bind]] or [[freeze]] spells, he will unequip the player’s weapon while in melee range unless they are wearing them. Flambeed is weak to spells and crush attacks.

A popular way to defeat him is to use [[Snare]]/[[Entangle]] and proceed to cast Blast or Wave spells while maintaining distance. If melee is used, a strong crush weapon such as a [[dragon mace]] or [[Zamorakian hasta]] is recommended as well as wearing ice gloves, since melee users will always be in melee range.
It's rare but possible for him to spawn inside one of the portals. If this happens, he will be unable to move and players can safely attack him from a distance.

'''Note''': The player '''cannot''' use [[Prayer]] in this boss fight or any other [[Recipe for Disaster]] boss fight.

He can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete.
